class_balance_analysis.note: Binary classification is naturally imbalanced: 1 root cause per incident, N-1 non-causes
class_balance_analysis.recommendation: Use class_weight='balanced' in LogisticRegression or RandomForest

format_info.structure: Each JSONL line is an incident with Component 2 event format
format_info.labels_structure: Array of {service, endpoint, label, confidence, method, reasoning}
